Dented Brass Mask  
 


Slot: FACE
AC: 4
STR: +3
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Dented Brass Mask

Slot: FACE
AC: 4
STR: +3
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:2 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:64
Submitted By:Thejaff Stargazer
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:44:29
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 220pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 35

Permafrost Keep
NPC Name
a goblin archaeologist

Dents!
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 5:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Just by denting your mask you get +3STR! Sweet... I'm gonna go dent some Bronze Armor and see what happens. (this is a joke. harr harr)

QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2004 at 2:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798476354
29 posts
LMAO look at warmaster Mrgoc from Gulf o Gunthak, he drtops the dented brass cuirass, look no further !

PS he is a rare spwan, rare drop deal, only for those that reaky want some dents ! or like me doing a character in LoY gear only

QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2003 at 2:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258732278
2 posts
Wouldnt u have to dent BRASS armor tho? lol
▲ Page top
Nice item... just got it
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2001 at 8:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591771853151
153 posts
Logged into a VERY uncrowded Oasis of Marr zone this morning (only 2 others in the zone). Killed a caimen, and it dropped a Frozen Flower. I thought wtf??? Then I walked near the dock and there on the dock was a freaking ice goblin named Smee. At first I ran, then I conned it (bright red, but indifferent). Turns out it was a GM playing an ice gob who was looking for his frozen flowers. So, I start huning more, killing everything I can. After turning in two flowers, Smee gave me the Dented Brass Mask and a white wolf-hide cloak. Both items were improvements over my non-magical leather stuff. Thank god everybody else was on the Moon playing cats and Oasis was sparsely populated. Thanks Smee!
▲ Page top
RE: Nice item... just got it
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2004 at 8:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782115401
34 posts
Was looking at some of the old posts...This was written almost 3 years ago...Everyone would call this a SUX item, now....but 3 years ago, it was an upgrade for a 58 lvl Rogue...What has happened?? I think it is great that SoE has given us such UBER upgrades...What I am really curious about, is that I have only been playing for about 1 and 3/4 years and I have yet to ever see a GM roaming around giving a cool quest to anyone...Especially, in a lonely zone like this..*Sigh*...With all the cool new gear and quest we have, it would still be a thrill to find a GM, someday, who is out there giving some lonely player a special quest and a cool new item...Guess those days are long gone, huh??
▲ Page top
got this last night
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 11:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250754921
1 post
i was grouped with 2 clerics ( one was lvl 26 other 27) and my warrior lvl 27 and a rogue lvl 24 adn a druid lvl 25). we roasted this guy easily over and over. me and the rogue got the dented mask and i got 2 arc packs (i asked to loot them they said ok) got the ruined circlet too for my druid just get a good group and roast the place i dinged also to 28 was awesome.
▲ Page top
RE: got this last night
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 8:50 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
the arch packs were Lore items. How did you get two of them?
▲ Page top
44 druid...
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 8:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247986931
56 posts
granted, druids dont have the best nukes, but at 44, i got agroed by everyhthing in the area it seemed... got the mask and the bag each once, but still lol was fairly tough for me to kill him and stay alive =).. especially when his buddies attackin you and healing him.. hard to get a good nuke or so off
▲ Page top
Which is better?
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 4:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249986029
39 posts
Which is better for a Monk...this or a Burynai Hide mask...the mask is 3AC, +2 Str, +2 Sta (I think) but has less Armor and is lighter...
▲ Page top
RE: Which is better?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 8:55 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Burynai Hide mask 3ac 2dex 2sta. I would prefer to go for the extra str but the extra sta from the frubie mask is helpful.
▲ Page top
Smoked
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 4:18 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yep, that guy has a lot of bad company. Me( a 30 warrior) a 27 rogue and a 32 shaman got our butts kicked in there cause all his healing and nuking buddies. Me and the rogue died and the shaman had to run. Bad news, I think level 35 sounds about right to me.
▲ Page top
Which is Better
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2001 at 2:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592341527836
Scholar
188 posts
Whats better for a 38 warrior, this or a Braided Beard of the Coldain? I'm unable to use the proc of the beard so dont facter that into the decision.
▲ Page top
RE: Which is Better
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 10:47 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Bah both are junk for a warrior. Neither of the mentioned items is worth sacrificing the AC of a simple fine plate visor for.
▲ Page top
RE: Which is Better
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 9:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762612188
111 posts

Actually the have the same combat value.

Fine plate visor AC7 = CV of 7
Dented Mask AC4 + STR 3 = CV of 7

So, it really depends on what stat you need improvement...offense or defense.

I forgot the guides name for CV stuff but look it up if you want.
Amosk
Dru-Ro
▲ Page top
What's the dealio???
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2001 at 5:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753593278
13 posts
The level to attain for this item shows 35, yet the MoB it drops off of shows 24-27. I was waxing this guy with a 26 mage...
▲ Page top
RE: What's the dealio???
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2001 at 5:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756602073
9 posts
I'm thinking it's because of the average level of mobs in the Arch's area, not good to tell a 24-27 person they can get this, then have a warrior wander out to find him and get smote by somethin higher level before they get there...lol
▲ Page top
RE: What's the dealio???
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2001 at 12:48 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The deal is there are 3 or 4 priests as well a wizard that nukes for 250 per shot in that room as well. If you happen to get unlucky with your pull you're toast.
